title: Summer Pockets
description:
StaffOriginal Story: Jun Maeda

Producer: Touya Okano

description_short: From the creators of Angel Beats! and CLANNAD, Key, comes their latest emotional, award-winning journey. Follow protagonist Takahara Hairi as he travels to the secluded island Torishirojima, where he rediscovers what it means to enjoy summer vacation.
